_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to develop career path opportunities.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.532), AB-S-004 (AB, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.493). Shared vocabulary: [career]. DCWF-only terms [ability, develop, opportunities, path] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, data, design, developing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.910, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.057 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Ability to develop career path opportunities." and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.563 > STS 0.493 (gap +0.069). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [career] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Shared tokens: [career]. DCWF-only: [ability, develop, opportunities, path]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, data, design, developing].

signals.detail: STS 0.493 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
